name: Study 5: Baseline Characterization — Post-MI Clopidogrel vs Aspirin Initiators
description: Baseline covariate profile of post-MI clopidogrel vs aspirin new-users for Study 5.

design_json.description: Baseline characterization of post-MI clopidogrel vs aspirin initiators. Key covariates: MI type (STEMI vs NSTEMI), cardiac procedures (PCI, CABG), comorbidities (CHF, hypertension, diabetes, CKD), concurrent medications (statins, antihypertensives), Charlson index. Validates active comparator assumption.
